dogs.title: Dogs
dogs.p: The Puravie line for Dogs was created with carefully selected proteins, offering excellent nutrition. With a delicious taste that wins over even the most demanding palates, it helps acceptance and turns every meal into a moment of pleasure and satisfaction.

cats.title: Cats
cats.p: In the Puravie line for Cats, you’ll find the essential nutrients to promote your feline friend’s health and well-being, with a taste they’ll love. Enriched with natural antioxidants such as vitamin C, vitamin E, and organic selenium, our food helps protect against premature aging.

about.title: About us
about.p: Our brand is a warm hug in every kibble!

program.title: Satisfaction Program
program.p: Our four-legged family members mean great responsibility, love, and challenge. We know they have their own tastes, and getting the flavor right can be difficult. Don’t forget to always offer the correct nutrition considering size, life stage, and in some cases their specific needs. A complete diet helps your pet enjoy a better quality of life. Follow your veterinarian’s recommendations, always provide fresh water, walks, affection, and lots of love. If your pet doesn’t adapt to our food, don’t worry — we have the 110% Satisfaction campaign — we can exchange it for another variety or offer a refund of the amount paid + 10%. To do so, contact our Customer Service and have on hand:
list: Receipt/invoice from the partner store where you purchased the product
Keep at least 75% of the product in the original package, following the instructions on the packaging
Product within the expiration date printed on the package
